title: 2nd and 3rd Impacts
wikitext:
[]: 2nd and 3rd Impacts             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Mon Jun 08, 2009 9:38 pm I have several questions. If Adam had succeeded in 2I and reclaimed the world for Angelkind, what would have happened to all the other lifeforms? Second, after the disaster that was 2I, why would SEELE try it again? Wouldn't they realize they'd be effectively committing genocide and wiping everything out? Third, if they wanted all souls as one, why stop 2I at all?

[]:             Quote Post by Consul_Elect » Mon Jun 08, 2009 10:37 pm Adam could not reclaim earth for angel kind during 2I as the only way to claim earth for angel kind would be to reunite angles with lilith and adam... Instrumentality therfore wouldn't have occured during 2I as adam and lilith were not as one being. Apart they are not gods with the power to cause instrumentality of either lifeform. So 3I needs to happen. I guess SEELE know that 3I would wipe everything out, but they dont care cause if it goes their way their souls will transend and they wont need earth... or bodies for that matter. That's how I see it. Feel free to apose me. Peace & love

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Mon Jun 08, 2009 11:08 pm Topics this could have gone in: Why did everyone want third impact anyway? Question regarding angels / Second Impact. 2nd Impact

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Jun 09, 2009 12:15 pm If Adam had succeeded in 2I and reclaimed the world for Angelkind, what would have happened to all the other lifeforms?
